reports.title: Resting Heart Rate Trend (Weekly)
reports.query:
MATCH (d:Day)-[:PART_OF]->(w:Week)
MATCH (d)-[:HAS_SUMMARY]->(s:DailySummary)
WHERE s.resting_heart_rate IS NOT NULL
RETURN w.start_date AS date,
       round(avg(s.resting_heart_rate), 1) AS `Resting HR (bpm)`
ORDER BY w.start_date

reports.title: HRV Trend (Weekly)
reports.query:
MATCH (d:Day)-[:PART_OF]->(w:Week)
MATCH (d)-[:HAS_SUMMARY]->(s:DailySummary)
WHERE s.hrv_mean IS NOT NULL
RETURN w.start_date AS date,
       round(avg(s.hrv_mean), 1) AS `HRV (ms)`
ORDER BY w.start_date

reports.title: VO2max Progression
reports.query:
MATCH (d:Day)-[:HAS_SUMMARY]->(s:DailySummary)
WHERE s.vo2max IS NOT NULL
RETURN d.date AS date,
       s.vo2max AS `VO2max (mL/kg/min)`
ORDER BY d.date

reports.title: Daily Steps
reports.query:
MATCH (d:Day)-[:PART_OF]->(w:Week)
MATCH (d)-[:HAS_SUMMARY]->(s:DailySummary)
WHERE s.total_steps IS NOT NULL
RETURN w.start_date AS date,
       round(avg(s.total_steps)) AS `Avg Daily Steps`
ORDER BY w.start_date

reports.title: Monthly Workout Volume (minutes)
reports.query:
MATCH (d:Day)-[:HAS_SUMMARY]->(s:DailySummary)
WITH d.date.year AS year, d.date.month AS month, s
RETURN year + '-' + right('0' + toString(month), 2) AS month,
       round(sum(s.workout_minutes), 0) AS `Workout Minutes`
ORDER BY month

reports.title: Sleep Duration (Weekly Average)
reports.query:
MATCH (d:Day)-[:PART_OF]->(w:Week)
MATCH (d)-[:HAS_SUMMARY]->(s:DailySummary)
WHERE s.sleep_hours IS NOT NULL
RETURN w.start_date AS date,
       round(avg(s.sleep_hours), 1) AS `Sleep (hours)`
ORDER BY w.start_date

reports.title: Workout Type Distribution
reports.query:
MATCH (w:Workout)
RETURN w.activity_type AS type, count(*) AS count
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 10

reports.title: Monthly Longevity Dashboard
reports.query:
MATCH (d:Day)-[:HAS_SUMMARY]->(s:DailySummary)
WITH d.date.year AS year, d.date.month AS month, s
RETURN year + '-' + right('0' + toString(month), 2) AS Month,
       round(avg(s.resting_heart_rate), 1) AS `RHR`,
       round(avg(s.hrv_mean), 1) AS `HRV`,
       round(avg(s.vo2max), 1) AS `VO2max`,
       round(avg(s.sleep_hours), 1) AS `Sleep (h)`,
       round(avg(s.total_steps), 0) AS `Avg Steps`,
       sum(s.workout_count) AS `Workouts`,
       round(sum(s.workout_minutes), 0) AS `Workout Min`,
       count(*) AS `Days`
ORDER BY Month DESC
LIMIT 12

reports.title: Workout Impact on Next-Day HRV
reports.query:
MATCH (w:Workout)-[:ON_DAY]->(d1:Day)-[:HAS_SUMMARY]->(s1:DailySummary)
MATCH (d1)-[:NEXT_DAY]->(d2:Day)-[:HAS_SUMMARY]->(s2:DailySummary)
WHERE s1.hrv_mean IS NOT NULL AND s2.hrv_mean IS NOT NULL
RETURN w.activity_type AS `Workout Type`,
       count(*) AS `Count`,
       round(avg(s1.hrv_mean), 1) AS `HRV Workout Day`,
       round(avg(s2.hrv_mean), 1) AS `HRV Next Day`,
       round(avg(s2.hrv_mean - s1.hrv_mean), 1) AS `HRV Change`
ORDER BY `HRV Change` DESC

reports.title: Training Load vs Recovery (Weekly)
reports.query:
MATCH (d:Day)-[:PART_OF]->(w:Week)
MATCH (d)-[:HAS_SUMMARY]->(s:DailySummary)
WHERE s.hrv_mean IS NOT NULL
WITH w,
     sum(s.workout_minutes) AS train_min,
     round(avg(s.hrv_mean), 1) AS avg_hrv
RETURN w.start_date AS date,
       train_min AS `Training Min`,
       avg_hrv AS `Avg HRV`
ORDER BY w.start_date

reports.title: Rest Day Recovery (HRV on non-workout days)
reports.query:
MATCH (d:Day)-[:HAS_SUMMARY]->(s:DailySummary)
WHERE s.workout_count = 0 AND s.hrv_mean IS NOT NULL
OPTIONAL MATCH (d_prev:Day)-[:NEXT_DAY]->(d)
OPTIONAL MATCH (d_prev)-[:HAS_SUMMARY]->(s_prev:DailySummary)
RETURN d.date AS `Rest Day`,
       s.hrv_mean AS `HRV`,
       s.resting_heart_rate AS `RHR`,
       s.sleep_hours AS `Sleep`,
       s_prev.workout_count AS `Prev Day Workouts`
ORDER BY d.date DESC
LIMIT 30

reports.title: Overtraining Risk (Weekly)
reports.query:
MATCH (d:Day)-[:PART_OF]->(w:Week)
MATCH (d)-[:HAS_SUMMARY]->(s:DailySummary)
WHERE s.hrv_mean IS NOT NULL
WITH w,
     sum(s.workout_minutes) AS weekly_training_min,
     avg(s.hrv_mean) AS weekly_avg_hrv,
     avg(s.resting_heart_rate) AS weekly_avg_rhr
RETURN w.iso AS Week,
       round(weekly_training_min, 0) AS `Training Min`,
       round(weekly_avg_hrv, 1) AS `Avg HRV`,
       round(weekly_avg_rhr, 1) AS `Avg RHR`,
       CASE
         WHEN weekly_training_min > 300 AND weekly_avg_hrv < 30 THEN 'OVERTRAINING RISK'
         WHEN weekly_training_min > 200 AND weekly_avg_hrv < 35 THEN 'CAUTION'
         ELSE 'OK'
       END AS Alert
ORDER BY w.iso DESC
LIMIT 12

reports.title: Cleaning rules & caveats
reports.query:
**Raw `Workout.duration_min` is unreliable.** This page applies two cleaning rules before aggregating:

- **R1 — Clamp at 240 min (4 h)** per workout. Removes ~50 'watch-forgot-to-stop' sessions where `end_date` drifts to midnight.
- **R2 — Per `(day, activity_type)`, MAX across sources.** Removes cross-app double-tracking (Komoot + Watch cycling, Home Workouts + Watch strength, Runkeeper + Watch running, BEAT81 + Watch cycling).

Residual limits: genuine 5–8 h rides are capped at 4 h, so 2025 totals are still conservatively low. See `docs/EXERCISE_REPORT.md` for details and `cypher/exercise_duration_clean.cypher` for the queries.

reports.title: Weekly exercise hours (cleaned)
reports.query:
MATCH (w:Workout)-[:ON_DAY]->(d:Day)
WITH d, w,
     CASE WHEN w.duration_min > 240 THEN 240.0 ELSE w.duration_min END AS mins_clean
WITH d.date AS day, w.activity_type AS type, w.source_name AS source,
     sum(mins_clean) AS source_min
WITH day, type, max(source_min) AS type_min
WITH day, sum(type_min) AS day_min
WITH date.truncate('week', day) AS week_start, sum(day_min) AS week_min
RETURN week_start AS date,
       round(week_min / 60.0, 2) AS `Hours / Week`
ORDER BY week_start

reports.title: Yearly summary (cleaned)
reports.query:
MATCH (w:Workout)-[:ON_DAY]->(d:Day)
WITH d, w,
     CASE WHEN w.duration_min > 240 THEN 240.0 ELSE w.duration_min END AS mins_clean
WITH d.date AS day, w.activity_type AS type, w.source_name AS source,
     sum(mins_clean) AS source_min
WITH day, type, max(source_min) AS type_min
WITH day, sum(type_min) AS day_min
WITH day.year AS yr,
     sum(day_min) AS year_min,
     count(DISTINCT day) AS active_days,
     count(DISTINCT day.week) AS weeks_covered
RETURN toString(yr) AS Year,
       active_days AS `Active Days`,
       toInteger(year_min) / 60 AS `Total h`,
       toInteger(year_min) % 60 AS `Total m`,
       round(year_min / active_days, 0) AS `Avg min / Active Day`,
       round(year_min / weeks_covered / 60.0, 1) AS `Avg h / Week`
ORDER BY Year

reports.title: Monthly exercise hours (cleaned)
reports.query:
MATCH (w:Workout)-[:ON_DAY]->(d:Day)
WITH d, w,
     CASE WHEN w.duration_min > 240 THEN 240.0 ELSE w.duration_min END AS mins_clean
WITH d.date AS day, w.activity_type AS type, w.source_name AS source,
     sum(mins_clean) AS source_min
WITH day, type, max(source_min) AS type_min
WITH day, sum(type_min) AS day_min
WITH day.year AS yr, day.month AS mo, sum(day_min) AS month_min
RETURN toString(yr) + '-' + right('0' + toString(mo), 2) AS month,
       round(month_min / 60.0, 1) AS `Hours`
ORDER BY month

reports.title: Last 12 weeks — detail (cleaned)
reports.query:
MATCH (w:Workout)-[:ON_DAY]->(d:Day)
WITH d, w,
     CASE WHEN w.duration_min > 240 THEN 240.0 ELSE w.duration_min END AS mins_clean
WITH d.date AS day, w.activity_type AS type, w.source_name AS source,
     sum(mins_clean) AS source_min
WITH day, type, max(source_min) AS type_min
WITH day, sum(type_min) AS day_min
WITH day.year AS yr, day.week AS wk,
     date.truncate('week', day) AS week_start,
     sum(day_min) AS week_min, count(DISTINCT day) AS active_days
RETURN toString(yr) + '-W' + right('0' + toString(wk), 2) AS Week,
       week_start AS `Week Start`,
       active_days AS `Active Days`,
       toInteger(week_min) / 60 AS `h`,
       toInteger(week_min) % 60 AS `m`,
       round(week_min / active_days, 0) AS `Avg min / Active Day`
ORDER BY week_start DESC
LIMIT 12

reports.title: Raw vs cleaned per month (audit)
reports.query:
MATCH (w:Workout)-[:ON_DAY]->(d:Day)
WITH d.date.year AS yr, d.date.month AS mo, sum(w.duration_min) AS raw_min
MATCH (w2:Workout)-[:ON_DAY]->(d2:Day)
WHERE d2.date.year = yr AND d2.date.month = mo
WITH yr, mo, raw_min, d2, w2,
     CASE WHEN w2.duration_min > 240 THEN 240.0 ELSE w2.duration_min END AS mc
WITH yr, mo, raw_min, d2.date AS day, w2.activity_type AS t, w2.source_name AS s,
     sum(mc) AS src_min
WITH yr, mo, raw_min, day, t, max(src_min) AS tm
WITH yr, mo, raw_min, sum(tm) AS clean_min
RETURN toString(yr) + '-' + right('0' + toString(mo), 2) AS month,
       round(raw_min / 60.0, 1) AS `Raw h`,
       round(clean_min / 60.0, 1) AS `Cleaned h`,
       round((raw_min - clean_min) / 60.0, 1) AS `Removed h`,
       round(100.0 * (raw_min - clean_min) / raw_min, 1) AS `Removed %`
ORDER BY month

reports.title: Runaway sessions (> 4 h) — data-quality flags
reports.query:
MATCH (w:Workout)-[:ON_DAY]->(d:Day)
WHERE w.duration_min > 240
RETURN d.date AS Day,
       w.activity_type AS Type,
       w.source_name AS Source,
       toInteger(w.duration_min) / 60 AS h,
       toInteger(w.duration_min) % 60 AS m,
       w.start_date AS Start,
       w.end_date AS End
ORDER BY w.duration_min DESC
LIMIT 25

reports.title: Cross-source overlaps (double-tracking) — with timestamps
reports.query:
MATCH (w1:Workout)-[:ON_DAY]->(d:Day)<-[:ON_DAY]-(w2:Workout)
WHERE w1.uid < w2.uid
  AND w1.source_name <> w2.source_name
  AND w1.start_date  <  w2.end_date
  AND w2.start_date  <  w1.end_date
WITH d, w1, w2,
     duration.inSeconds(
       CASE WHEN w1.start_date > w2.start_date THEN w1.start_date ELSE w2.start_date END,
       CASE WHEN w1.end_date   < w2.end_date   THEN w1.end_date   ELSE w2.end_date   END
     ).seconds / 60.0 AS overlap_min
RETURN d.date AS Day,
       w1.source_name + ' / ' + w1.activity_type AS `Source A`,
       w1.start_date AS `A start`,
       w1.end_date   AS `A end`,
       round(w1.duration_min, 1) AS `A min`,
       w2.source_name + ' / ' + w2.activity_type AS `Source B`,
       w2.start_date AS `B start`,
       w2.end_date   AS `B end`,
       round(w2.duration_min, 1) AS `B min`,
       round(overlap_min, 1) AS `Overlap min`,
       CASE
         WHEN w1.start_date <= w2.start_date AND w1.end_date >= w2.end_date THEN 'B inside A'
         WHEN w2.start_date <= w1.start_date AND w2.end_date >= w1.end_date THEN 'A inside B'
         ELSE 'partial'
       END AS `Kind`
ORDER BY Day DESC
LIMIT 25

reports.title: Health Graph — Last 7 Days
reports.query:
MATCH (d:Day)-[:HAS_SUMMARY]->(s:DailySummary)
WHERE d.date >= date() - duration('P7D')
OPTIONAL MATCH (d)<-[:ON_DAY]-(w:Workout)
OPTIONAL MATCH (d)<-[:ON_DAY]-(sl:SleepSession)
OPTIONAL MATCH (d)-[:NEXT_DAY]->(d2:Day)
RETURN d, s, w, sl, d2
LIMIT 50

reports.title: Person → Device → Workout Network
reports.query:
MATCH (p:Person)-[:USES]->(dev:Device)
OPTIONAL MATCH (dev)-[:RECORDED]->(w:Workout)
WITH p, dev, count(w) AS workouts
RETURN p, dev, workouts
ORDER BY workouts DESC
LIMIT 50
